cat > agent-workspace/task_helper.sh << 'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Quick task helper: checks if the current page title contains a keyword.
# Usage: source task_helper.sh && page_title_contains "dashboard"

page_title_contains() {
    local keyword="$1"
    local title
    title=$(browser_page_info | jq -r '.title // ""')
    echo "$title" | grep -qi "$keyword"
}
EOF
chmod +x agent-workspace/task_helper.sh
